hyperedges.label: Canvas node visual contract (168x36 capsule, AppColors, tokens)
daemon_cmd bootstrap: db + provider + scheduler + api/web/mcp routers wired onto single axum app
Event-driven job execution pipeline: db watch channel → scheduler::run → launch_worker_for_job → run_stage (opencode adapter + workflow engine + git checkpoint)
External control surface: MCP tools + CLI subcommands + REST handlers all funnel into Database with shared jobs state machine
